name: OpenSCAP — SCAP/OVAL/XCCDF compliance & vulnerability
description: Imports an OpenSCAP (https://www.open-scap.org) report into the XORCISM model. Run `oscap` yourself and pass the output file: OVAL results (`oscap oval eval --results res.xml <oval.xml>`), XCCDF results (`oscap xccdf eval --results res.xml <ds.xml>`) or an ARF report (`--results-arf arf.xml`, which bundles both). The scanned host becomes an ASSET; OVAL vulnerability-class `true` definitions become VULN findings (the referenced CVE), OVAL inventory-class `true` become CPE (installed software), and failed XCCDF rules become VULN findings (compliance gaps). Read-only import (no DB access in run.py, worker-safe). This is the file-based counterpart of the XOR agent's live OVAL scan (/api/agent/oval).

parameters.name: file
parameters.help: Path on the worker to an oscap report: OVAL results, XCCDF results, or an ARF (.xml) report.

parameters.name: target
parameters.help: Asset name/host for the report (default: the report's host name, else the file name).
